allow: PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\sumiy\\Documents\\sumiya\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\newmomcircle"; npx tsc --project apps/web/tsconfig.json --noEmit 2>&1; Write-Host "Exit code: $LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell(try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3003" -TimeoutSec 10 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Status: $\($response.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "Content length: $\($response.Content.Length\)" } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -TimeoutSec 10 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "3000: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "3000: $_" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3004" -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "3004: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "3004: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3003" -TimeoutSec 10 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "Length: $\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })
PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:3003" -TimeoutSec 15 -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })
